params.amounts: Corresponding array of amounts (must match recipients length)

params.tokens: Array of ERC20 token addresses to check

returns.balances: Array of balances in the same order as tokens

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.amountIn: Exact amount of tokenIn to spend

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.lockIndex: Index into the caller's locks array

batchPay(address,address[],uint256[]).notice: Send an ERC20 token to multiple recipients in one transaction.

deposit(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Lock tokens for a specified number of days.

getBalances(address,address[]).notice: Read the ERC20 balance of a wallet across multiple tokens.         Read-only — no gas cost beyond the call itself.

getLocks(address).notice: Read all locks for a given wallet.

recoverToken(address,uint256).notice: Recover any ERC20 accidentally sent directly to this contract.

setSwapRouter(address).notice: Update the swap router address (owner only).

swap(address,address,uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Swap an exact amount of tokenIn for as much tokenOut as possible.

swapRouter().notice: Uniswap-compatible swap router deployed on Pharos

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraw a previously locked deposit after unlock time.
